items.hook: Fellhaneropsis is a genus of lichen-forming fungi in the family Ectolechiaceae.
items.body: The genus comprises 11 accepted species as of 2025. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Mineral waters of Nakhchivan are water springs in Nakhchivan Autonomous Republic that contain various minerals such as, sodium, potassium, magnesium, chloride and sulfur compounds.

items.hook: Malkhas Amoyan is an Armenian Greco-Roman wrestler.
items.body: He won the gold medal in the men's 72 kg event at the 2021 World Wrestling Championships held in Oslo, Norway, and earned his second gold medal at the 2025 World Wrestling Championships held in Zagreb, Croatia. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Ismail Khan Ziyadkhanov or Ismail Khan Ziyadkhanly was a member of the government of the Azerbaijan Democratic Republic, a diplomat, and a lieutenant colonel in the army of the Azerbaijan Democratic Republic.
items.body: He was one of the five Azerbaijanis elected to the First State Duma of the Russian Empire. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: REDMAP is a project of the Republican State Leadership Committee of the United States to increase Republican control of congressional seats, as well as state legislatures, largely through manipulating electoral district boundaries.
items.body: The project has made effective use of partisan gerrymandering by relying on previously unavailable mapping software, such as Caliper Corporation's Maptitude to improve the precision with which district lines are strategically drawn. One of those things you can
